creator: rfg@tristatelogic.com
text:
In message <51CAE77A.2090404@freebsd.org>, you wrote:

>Is this still an issue even after the latest update to xorg?
>Regards!


I'm sorry, but I have no easy way confirming or refuting the ongoing
presence or absence of this but at the moment, so I guess that it would
be best if you just marked it as closed.

Someone else can revive this PR if and when anybody ever actually makes
use of tmw again, you know, anytime in the entire future history of the
Universe... a possibility that actually seems a bit unlikely.


Regards,
rfg
